title: Illusion Travels by Streetcar
writer: Mauricio de la Serna, José Revueltas, Luis Alcoriza
actors: Lilia Prado, Carlos Navarro, Fernando Soto
plot: Confronted with the unfortunate news that their favorite Streetcar, no. 133, is going to be decommissioned, two Municipal Transit workers get drunk and decide to "take 'er for one last spin".
